title: 5 things to know about Red Sox interim manager Chad Tracy
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Boston Red Sox Tracy has been the Triple-A Worcester Red Sox manager since 2022.

title: Alex Cora is a terrific manager, but a fresh start could benefit the Red Sox. Both can be true.
author: Trevor Hass
bullets: Boston Red Sox Cora firmly and unequivocally established himself as one of the best managers in franchise history.

title: Red Sox fire manager Alex Cora and key assistant coaches
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Boston Red Sox Cora led Boston to a 10-17 record through the first 27 games of the season.

title: 4 things to know about Patriots sixth-round pick Dametrious Crownover
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: New England Patriots Crownover became Texas A&M’s starting right tackle in 2024.
